prompt:
A basil plant in a small rockwool cube and net pot is shown after a recent harvest: most of the large leaves have been removed, leaving pruned stems with smaller leaves and nodes where new growth will emerge. A small pile of freshly cut basil leaves rests on a nearby dish or cutting board, clearly separated from the still-living plant. The rockwool cube at the base appears moist and healthy, emphasizing that the plant will regrow from what remains.

The scene is a near-future solarpunk kitchen-garden hybrid space, with soft overhead lighting, other herb plants nearby, and a clean countertop or hydroponic tray beneath. The 512×512 image is photorealistic with gentle stylization, no logos or text, and a composition that focuses on the pruned basil plant and the small pile of harvested leaves while the background garden and workspace stay softly blurred.
